probes.name: coupon-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms both migrations this module ships have run: coupons + coupon_redemptions, plus their composite unique indexes.

probes.name: coupon-unique-indexes-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique indexes exist: partial (tenant_id, code) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND active window on coupons; (tenant_id, coupon_id, customer_type, customer_id, applied_to_type, applied_to_id) on coupon_redemptions. Missing any index risks double-redemption races that bypass the SELECT FOR UPDATE row lock.

probes.name: coupon-usage-count-drift-clean
probes.description: Reads academorix.coupon.usage_count.drift_ratio gauge. Any non-zero value indicates a counter-increment bug — CouponRedeemer's atomic increment leaked. P2 signal.

probes.name: coupon-clawback-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 50 rows in coupon_clawbacks_pending_queue are stuck > 30 min. Indicates ProcessCouponClawbackJob has stalled OR Finance module refund cascade isn't firing.

probes.name: coupon-atomicity-counter-clean
probes.description: Reads academorix.coupons.atomicity.failures_total counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal — the redemption + counter-increment transaction failed somewhere.

probes.name: coupon-slot-quota-headroom
probes.description: Warns when any tenant has > 95% of their `coupon_slot` cap consumed. Actionable — the tenant is about to hit COUPON_SLOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED on their next create.

probes.name: coupon-reconcile-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileUsageCountJob completed within the last 25 hours (nightly cadence + 1h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: coupon-preview-rate-limit-warm
probes.description: Confirms the coupon.rate_limit middleware cache is warm + reachable. Cold cache = every preview call takes an extra Redis roundtrip. Not a critical failure but a latency signal.
